subtitle: The scan finds the problems. This menu prices them. Pick what you need.

free.problem: Show me where AI would even help.
free.name: AnchorScan

items.problem: Tell me exactly what to fix and what it's worth.
items.name: AI Opportunity Audit
items.note: Scored report, quantified payoff, prioritized roadmap, one scoped first build. Fee credits toward the build.

items.name: 5-day landing page
items.note: One page that sells one thing. Live in 5 days.

items.problem: My idea needs to actually work.
items.name: 5-day MVP web app
items.note: One core workflow, built end to end. Live in 5 days.

items.problem: I'm losing customers to missed calls.
items.name: AI Receptionist
items.note: 24/7 AI on your existing line. Answers, books, escalates.

items.problem: Nobody ever replies to my reviews.
items.name: AI Review Responder
items.note: A drafted reply to every Google review. Google rewards it.

items.name: Care plan
items.note: Hosting, edits, and monitoring after launch.

items.problem: I need AI work every week, not one-offs.
items.name: Fractional AI Engineer
items.note: Anchor on retainer. Pause any week.
